## Meeting Purpose

[Review CVE page updates and align on content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/F297XKsPP_K-KJ2VyNY9PjnFCxEomXrU?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**CVE Fixes:** Four issues were identified on staging CVE pages (e.g., repetitive CVSS vectors, naked URLs). Marcus will fix them today, enabling new page publication this week.](https://fathom.video/share/F297XKsPP_K-KJ2VyNY9PjnFCxEomXrU?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [**CS101 Strategy:** Articles are too long (\~3k words), risking performance. GrowthX will share the template for SentinelOne to trim sections and will provide new topics next week to build a content runway.](https://fathom.video/share/F297XKsPP_K-KJ2VyNY9PjnFCxEomXrU?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
  - [**Meeting Cadence:** The sync is shifting to biweekly to focus on strategic insights and reporting, with daily progress updates moving to Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/F297XKsPP_K-KJ2VyNY9PjnFCxEomXrU?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

## Topics

### CVE Page Review & Fixes

  - [**Context:** Marcus pushed three updated CVE pages to staging for review, addressing an initial visual bug.](https://fathom.video/share/F297XKsPP_K-KJ2VyNY9PjnFCxEomXrU?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [**New Issues Identified:**](https://fathom.video/share/F297XKsPP_K-KJ2VyNY9PjnFCxEomXrU?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
      - [**Repetitive Content:** The CVSS vector string appears in both the sidebar and body text.](https://fathom.video/share/F297XKsPP_K-KJ2VyNY9PjnFCxEomXrU?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
          - [**Fix:** Remove from body text; keep in sidebar for readability.](https://fathom.video/share/F297XKsPP_K-KJ2VyNY9PjnFCxEomXrU?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
      - [**Ambiguous Links:** Multiple "Technical References" links have identical anchor text but lead to different URLs.](https://fathom.video/share/F297XKsPP_K-KJ2VyNY9PjnFCxEomXrU?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
          - [**Fix:** Add descriptive text to each link to clarify its destination.](https://fathom.video/share/F297XKsPP_K-KJ2VyNY9PjnFCxEomXrU?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
      - [**Naked URLs:** Raw, clickable URLs appear in the body content.](https://fathom.video/share/F297XKsPP_K-KJ2VyNY9PjnFCxEomXrU?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
          - [**Fix:** Hyperlink descriptive text instead of showing the full URL for better SEO hygiene.](https://fathom.video/share/F297XKsPP_K-KJ2VyNY9PjnFCxEomXrU?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
      - [**Incorrect Formatting:** "Detection Strategies" sections are sometimes unbulleted, despite being a list.](https://fathom.video/share/F297XKsPP_K-KJ2VyNY9PjnFCxEomXrU?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
          - [**Fix:** Ensure all list-like content in this section is bulleted.](https://fathom.video/share/F297XKsPP_K-KJ2VyNY9PjnFCxEomXrU?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [**Path Forward:**](https://fathom.video/share/F297XKsPP_K-KJ2VyNY9PjnFCxEomXrU?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
      - [Marcus will implement fixes today.](https://fathom.video/share/F297XKsPP_K-KJ2VyNY9PjnFCxEomXrU?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
      - [GrowthX will publish new CVE pages this week.](https://fathom.video/share/F297XKsPP_K-KJ2VyNY9PjnFCxEomXrU?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
      - [**Priority:** Publish new pages first; update existing pages later.](https://fathom.video/share/F297XKsPP_K-KJ2VyNY9PjnFCxEomXrU?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)

### CS101 Content Strategy

  - [**Status:** Four new articles are ready for review.](https://fathom.video/share/F297XKsPP_K-KJ2VyNY9PjnFCxEomXrU?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)
  - [**Issue:** Articles are too long (\~3,000 words), which can negatively impact performance.](https://fathom.video/share/F297XKsPP_K-KJ2VyNY9PjnFCxEomXrU?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
  - [**Action:** GrowthX will share the article template for SentinelOne to review and trim required sections to manage length.](https://fathom.video/share/F297XKsPP_K-KJ2VyNY9PjnFCxEomXrU?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
  - [**Content Runway:** GrowthX will provide new article topics next week to ensure a consistent pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/F297XKsPP_K-KJ2VyNY9PjnFCxEomXrU?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)

### Reporting & Planning

  - [**Airtable Sync:** Mansi is updating Airtable statuses. GrowthX will create a Slack automation to notify the team of status changes in real-time.](https://fathom.video/share/F297XKsPP_K-KJ2VyNY9PjnFCxEomXrU?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
  - [**2026 Planning:** A strategy session is scheduled for early February, aligning with SentinelOne's internal FI27 planning.](https://fathom.video/share/F297XKsPP_K-KJ2VyNY9PjnFCxEomXrU?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
  - [**Reporting:** The December deep-dive report is delayed due to holiday schedules and will be shared next week.](https://fathom.video/share/F297XKsPP_K-KJ2VyNY9PjnFCxEomXrU?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Marcus:** Implement the four CVE page fixes today.](https://fathom.video/share/F297XKsPP_K-KJ2VyNY9PjnFCxEomXrU?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/F297XKsPP_K-KJ2VyNY9PjnFCxEomXrU?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
      - [Publish new CVE pages this week after fixes are live.](https://fathom.video/share/F297XKsPP_K-KJ2VyNY9PjnFCxEomXrU?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
      - [Share the CS101 article template for review.](https://fathom.video/share/F297XKsPP_K-KJ2VyNY9PjnFCxEomXrU?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
      - [Provide new CS101 topics next week.](https://fathom.video/share/F297XKsPP_K-KJ2VyNY9PjnFCxEomXrU?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)
      - [Create the Airtable-to-Slack notification automation.](https://fathom.video/share/F297XKsPP_K-KJ2VyNY9PjnFCxEomXrU?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
      - [Share the December deep-dive report next week.](https://fathom.video/share/F297XKsPP_K-KJ2VyNY9PjnFCxEomXrU?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
      - [Schedule the 2026 planning session for early February.](https://fathom.video/share/F297XKsPP_K-KJ2VyNY9PjnFCxEomXrU?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
